content: هُوَّ مَعَهُ النُسخة بِتَاعَة مُفْتَاحِ بَيْتِهِ
translations: eng:he has the copy of my house key

transcriptions.arabizi: huwwa maAa|ah ilnuscha bitaeAit muftaeh biyt|i
